instructions.summary: Submit VerdeDesk to 4 product directories (all free, ~10 min total).
instructions.detail: Product directories give free backlinks and exposure to early adopters. All content is pre-written in .github/distribution/directory-submissions.md. Just copy-paste into each form.
instructions.exact_action:
1. BetaList (betalist.com/submit) — sign up, paste the pre-written fields. Free, reviewed in 1-4 weeks.
2. MicroLaunch (microlaunch.net, click 'New Launch') — paste fields. Free, runs for 1 month.
3. Uneed (uneed.best/submit-a-tool) — paste fields. Free.
4. Launching Next (launchingnext.com/submit) — paste fields. Free, near-instant approval.
instructions.unblocks: SEO backlinks + early adopter exposure for waitlist signups.
